text: Lindsey Graham, longtime senator from South Carolina, dies at 71 - The Washington Post
fullText: Graham, a staunch Trump ally and key GOP foreign policy voice, was running for reelection this year. He died of a “brief and sudden illness,” his office said.

text: Survivors of Iranian attack that killed 6 U.S. troops say generals ignored warnings - The Washington Post
fullText: The drone strike on Port Shuaiba in Kuwait occurred on day two of the war. Those who were there say they fear no one will be held accountable.

text: Key moments from former Qatar Emir Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani’s life - Al Jazeera
fullText: Sheikh Hamad’s 18-year rule catapulted Qatar to prosperity and reshaped its domestic, regional and global footprint.

text: New Medicaid work requirements prompt ‘extreme mass confusion’ in Nebraska - NBC News
fullText: In the first state to implement the Trump administration mandate, Medicaid participants are anxious for information — and are struggling to get it.

text: Mexico-US relations are already strained, but experts say they’re about to get worse - CNN
fullText: The death of a Mexican man in Houston at the hands of Immigration and Customs Enforcement is threatening to upend already-strained relations between Mexico and the United States.

text: Free samples with a side of serotonin: Welcome to the Costco feeding frenzy - USA Today
fullText: America loves free samples and that's just how Costco likes it. These bite-sized treats fuel bulk sales by getting Costco shoppers to buy even more.

text: U.K. rattled by killing of politician Ann Widdecombe as murder probe continues - NBC News
fullText: LONDON — A former British lawmaker was found dead with serious injuries at her home Thursday, prompting a murder investigation that has reignited concerns about the safety of the country’s politicians.

text: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz, US launches fresh strikes - dw.com
fullText: The Iranian navy has said it closed the Strait of Hormuz after firing on a vessel transiting an "unapproved route." In response, the US launched a third set of strikes on Iran this week. Follow DW for more.

text: US attacks Iran over ship being hit in Strait of Hormuz; Tehran lashes out again at Gulf Arab states - AP News
fullText: The United States has attacked Iran over an Iranian strike on a vessel in the Strait of Hormuz. The strike early Sunday set a container ship ablaze and forced its crew to abandon it. Iran apparently responded with strikes targeting Bahrain, Kuwait, Qatar and …

text: Focus turns to building stronger institutions in Africa to speed shift to renewable energy - AP News
fullText: Africa’s renewable energy transition is entering a new phase as the continent shifts from proving that clean energy works to building the institutions needed to deploy it at scale. As industrialization, artificial intelligence and electrification boost demand…

text: How Aldi is taking on US supermarkets with its $4 almond butter - BBC
fullText: The German supermarket's $9bn US push targets urban hubs like Manhattan. Can its discount model match Walmart?

text: Seahawks sold to current NFL owner for record price. Who is Vinod Kohsla? - USA Today
fullText: The Seattle Seahawks will soon be owned by a venture capitalist who is currently a minority owner of the 49ers. The deal must be approved by NFL owners.

text: T. rex fossil could become most expensive dinosaur ever sold - BBC

text: Kylie Kelce weighs in on when fans can expect Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce wedding photos - Yahoo

text: Guggenheim Museum among NYC buildings that tested positive for Legionnaires' amid disease outbreak - PBS
